items.raw_excerpt: Sauberes Wasser für ein abgelegenes Dorf in Kenia: Durch die Unterstützung des Salzburger Vereins „Hakuna Matata“ und regionaler Partner konnte in Kagera ein Brunnen mit Versorgungsnetz gebaut werden.
items.summary_en: A remote village in Kenya now has clean water. The Salzburg group Hakuna Matata and local partners helped build a well and water supply network in Kagera.
items.summary_ko: 케냐의 한 외딴 마을에 깨끗한 물이 공급되기 시작했다. 잘츠부르크 단체 하쿠나 마타타와 지역 협력자들의 지원으로 카게라에 우물과 급수망이 만들어졌다.
items.title_en: Well Brings Clean Water to Village in Kenya
items.title_ko: 케냐 마을에 깨끗한 물을 전하는 우물 완공
items.title_original: Brunnen versorgt Dorf in Kenia: Sauberes Wasser dank Salzburger Projekt - MeinBezirk.at

items.raw_excerpt: Rome, Florence and Turin all celebrate their patron saints in late June, with Florence and Turin sharing the same 'santo patrono'. How are the cities honouring their beloved saints this year?
items.summary_en: Florence, Rome and Turin will celebrate their patron saints in late June. Florence and Turin share the same patron saint and hold festivals at the same time. Each city has its own traditions to honor its beloved saint.
items.summary_ko: 피렌체, 로마, 토리노가 6월 말 수호성인 축제를 연다. 피렌체와 토리노는 같은 수호성인을 기리며 동시에 축제를 진행한다. 각 도시는 저마다의 전통 방식으로 성인을 기릴 예정이다.
items.title_en: Patron saint festivals coming up in Florence, Rome and Turin
items.title_ko: 피렌체, 로마, 토리노의 수호성인 축제 소식
items.title_original: Festa dei santi: Upcoming patron saint days in Florence, Rome and Turin

items.raw_excerpt: The vessels—which are thought to be the graves of high-status individuals—could potentially date back to the Viking Age.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists in Sweden found rare Viking Age burial ships. The vessels are believed to be graves of high-status individuals from the Viking era. The discovery is being called a sensational find.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 고고학자들이 바이킹 시대의 희귀한 매장선을 발굴했습니다. 이 배들은 당시 지배층의 무덤으로 추정됩니다. 고고학계는 이번 발견을 '경이로운 성과'라고 평가하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Viking Burial Ships Found in Sweden
items.title_ko: 스웨덴서 바이킹 시대 매장선 발굴…'경이로운 발견'
items.title_original: Viking Burial Ships Uncovered in ‘Sensational’ Archaeological Find - Newsweek

items.raw_excerpt: ニュースをメディアだけではなくSNSで拡散。ニュース、ニュースリリース、プレスリリース発信サービス
items.summary_en: Thirteen roadside stations from Hokkaido will come together near Sapporo Station. The Michi-no-Eki Fes in Sapporo will be held at Daimaru Sapporo and Sapporo Tokyu Department Store at the same time.
items.summary_ko: 홋카이도 안의 '미치노에키' 13곳이 삿포로역 주변에 한자리에 모인다. '미치노에키 페스 인 삿포로'는 다이마루 삿포로점과 삿포로 도큐 백화점 두 곳에서 동시에 열린다.

items.raw_excerpt: Located at Plaza Singapura, the lifestyle store sells lifestyle products such as keychains, bags, pouches, apparel and jewellery, and will operate till November this year.
items.summary_en: Singapore's first White Rabbit-themed pop-up store has opened at Plaza Singapura. The shop sells items like keychains, bags, pouches, clothes, and jewellery, and will run until November this year.

items.raw_excerpt: Visste du at i Alver finnes en truet landskapstype som er i ferd med å forsvinne? Og en amerikansk landsby!
items.summary_en: Alver has a threatened landscape type that is slowly disappearing. The area also has an unusual American village on Radøy.

items.raw_excerpt: Midsummer is one of the oldest and most widely celebrated holidays of the year in Sweden, but to the uninitiated, some of the festivities can seem a little bit... odd.
items.summary_en: Midsummer is one of Sweden's oldest and most popular holidays. But for newcomers, some celebrations can seem quite strange.
items.summary_ko: 한여름 축제는 스웨덴에서 가장 오래되고 널리 사랑받는 명절 중 하나다. 하지만 처음 접하는 사람들에게는 일부 축제 방식이 꽤 이상하게 보일 수 있다.
items.title_en: The seven bizarre traditions that make up Swedish Midsummer
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 한여름 축제의 7가지 특이한 전통
items.title_original: The seven bizarre traditions that make up Swedish Midsummer

items.raw_excerpt: Defensive tackle Keegan Gray-Wyckoff of Antwerp (Ohio) High School committed to Temple
items.summary_en: Keegan Gray-Wyckoff, a defensive tackle from Antwerp High School in Ohio, has committed to Temple. The small-town standout from Green Meadows is set to head to North Philadelphia.

items.raw_excerpt: It was part of a space rock that created a dramatic fireball over Uppsala.
items.summary_en: A lumpy 30-pound meteorite that created a dramatic fireball over Uppsala was recovered in a local village. It was part of a space rock that lit up the sky. Scientists confirmed it is an iron meteorite.
items.summary_ko: 웁살라 상공에서 극적인 불덩이를 만든 30파운드짜리 운석이 인근 마을에서 수거됐다. 이 운석은 하늘을 밝게 수놓은 우주 암석의 일부였다. 과학자들은 이것이 철 운석임을 확인했다.
items.title_en: 30-pound iron meteorite found in Swedish village after fireball
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 마을에서 발견된 30파운드 철 운석
items.title_original: Lumpy, 30-pound meteorite that crashed in Sweden recovered in local village - Live Science

items.raw_excerpt: The Centraal Museum is raising its profile with a show devoted to the Utrecht Caravaggisti – but it remains firmly grounded in the city
items.summary_en: The Centraal Museum has a new show about the Utrecht Caravaggisti. The article says the museum has world-class Old Masters, but still keeps a strong local city feel.
items.summary_ko: 위트레흐트의 센트랄 미술관이 위트레흐트 카라바조 화파를 다룬 전시로 주목도를 높이고 있습니다. 이 미술관은 세계적 수준의 옛 거장 작품을 갖췄지만, 여전히 도시와 단단히 연결된 지역 미술관의 분위기를 지키고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Utrecht museum highlights local Old Masters

items.raw_excerpt: Discover 7 classic general stores that still serve fishing villages, lake towns, and mountain communities across the state of Mainehttps://www.worldatlas.com/maps/united-states/maine.
items.summary_en: WorldAtlas highlights seven classic general stores across Maine. These shops still serve fishing villages, lake towns, and mountain communities with a local, old-time feel.

items.raw_excerpt: Am Stephanitag ist Stefanie Harms zu Gast bei Rafael Obermaier in „Blickwinkel – Gedanken am Feiertag“. Sie ist DER Internetstar 2025 und erzählt von ihrem Weg von ihrer Heimatgemeinde Neukirchen ins Netz, ihrem Podcast „Ketchup With A Friend“ und dem Leben zwischen Klicks, Dialekt und digitalem Druck: Am 26. Dezember von 18.00 bis 19.00 Uhr in ORF-Radio Salzburg.
items.summary_en: Stefanie Harms will be a guest on ORF Radio Salzburg on December 26. She will talk about growing up in Neukirchen, her podcast, dialect, clicks, and pressure online.
items.summary_ko: 슈테파니 하름스가 12월 26일 ORF 라디오 잘츠부르크에 출연한다. 그는 노이키르헨에서 자란 이야기와 팟캐스트, 사투리, 온라인 인기와 부담에 대해 말한다.
items.title_en: Stefanie Harms goes from village life to the internet
items.title_ko: 마을에서 인터넷 스타가 된 슈테파니 하름스

items.raw_excerpt: Aquellos lugares que llenan de gratas experiencias son destinos a los que se desea volver en cualquier oportunidad de viaje
items.summary_en: The article says Quintana Roo, Oaxaca, and Jalisco are places travelers want to visit again. It says places with good experiences become destinations people hope to return to on future trips.
items.summary_ko: 기사에 따르면 킨타나로오, 오악사카, 할리스코는 여행자들이 다시 방문하고 싶어 하는 지역이다. 좋은 경험을 남긴 장소는 다음 여행에서도 다시 찾고 싶은 목적지가 된다고 소개한다.

items.raw_excerpt: Some firms say project budgets have fallen by up to 60 per cent as artificial intelligence becomes increasingly common in music and voiceovers.
items.summary_en: Music studios in Singapore say project budgets have dropped by up to 60 percent. Clients are choosing AI-generated music and voiceovers instead of hiring human professionals.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 음반 스튜디오들의 프로젝트 예산이 최대 60%까지 줄었다. 의뢰사들이 사람 대신 AI로 음악과 음성을 제작하는 쪽으로 돌아서고 있기 때문이다.
items.title_en: Singapore music studios lose clients to AI
items.title_ko: 싱가포르 음반 스튜디오, AI에 고객 빼앗겨
items.title_original: Singapore music studios feel the squeeze as clients turn to AI-generated content

items.raw_excerpt: Karistaessaan pääkaupungin tomut jaloistaan suuntaavat monet helsinkiläiset mökille – Helsinkiin! Talvisaikaan Taivassalossa sijaitseva Helsinki on kuuden asukkaan uinuva kylä, mutta kesäisin sen väkimäärä moninkertaistuu.
items.summary_en: Many people from Helsinki leave the capital for cottages in summer. Some go to another Helsinki, a quiet village in Taivassalo with only six winter residents. In summer, its population grows many times over.
items.summary_ko: 여름이 되면 많은 헬싱키 사람들이 수도를 떠나 별장으로 향합니다. 그중 일부는 타이바살로에 있는 또 다른 헬싱키로 갑니다. 겨울에는 주민이 여섯 명뿐인 조용한 마을이지만, 여름에는 인구가 몇 배로 늘어납니다.
items.title_en: Summer Cottagers Fill a Tiny Helsinki
items.title_ko: 여름이면 작은 헬싱키를 채우는 별장 손님들
items.title_original: Mökkihelsinkiläiset täyttävät kesällä Helsingin - Yle

items.raw_excerpt: The 46 artworks which went missing from the premises of the municipality of Maashorst in Brabant last year “probably” ended up being taken away in a council rubbish van, according to an official investigation. Among the lost works is a silkscreen print of queen Beatrix from Andy Warhol’s 1985 series Reigning Queens, a series of 16 colourful prints of four monarchs: Elizabeth II of England, Beatrix of the Netherlands, Margrethe II of Denmark and Ntombi Twala of Eswatini (formerly Swaziland)....
items.summary_en: An inquiry says 46 artworks missing from Maashorst town offices were probably taken away in a council rubbish van. The lost works include an Andy Warhol print of Queen Beatrix.
items.summary_ko: 공식 조사에 따르면 마스호르스트 시청에서 사라진 미술품 46점은 시의 쓰레기 수거 차량에 실려 나갔을 가능성이 큽니다. 사라진 작품 중에는 앤디 워홀의 베아트릭스 여왕 판화도 포함돼 있습니다.
items.title_en: Missing town art was probably thrown away
items.title_ko: 마스호르스트의 사라진 미술품, 쓰레기차에 실렸을 가능성
items.title_original: Lost art, including Warhol print, was "probably" binned - DutchNews.nl

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is home to more than 45 cheesemakers and produces some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, one of the state’s most historic brands got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: Vermont has more than 45 cheesemakers and is known for some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, historic Grafton Village Cheese teamed up with another brand to keep its legacy going and bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트에는 45곳이 넘는 치즈 제조업체가 있으며, 미국에서도 손꼽히는 치즈 생산지로 알려져 있습니다. 약 1년 전, 오랜 역사를 지닌 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈는 다른 브랜드와 손잡고 전통을 이어 가며 치즈의 미래를 준비하게 됐습니다.
items.title_en: Grafton Village Cheese Looks to the Future
items.title_ko: 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈, 전통을 이어 미래로
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: The north-west city is up against eight other finalists…
items.summary_en: Devonport is trying to win Tassie's Top Tourism Town title for the fourth year in a row. The north-west city is competing with eight other finalists.
items.summary_ko: 데번포트가 태즈메이니아 최고 관광도시 타이틀을 4년 연속 노리고 있습니다. 태즈메이니아 북서부의 이 도시는 다른 최종 후보 8곳과 경쟁하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Devonport Seeks Fourth Top Tourism Town Win
items.title_ko: 데번포트, 관광도시상 4년 연속 수상 도전
items.title_original: Devonport eyes fourth straight ‘Tassie’s Top Tourism Town’ title - Pulse Tasmania
